endCutsceneWaitTime.Wiki: Delay before cutscene playback after win/loss.

finishTextTime.Wiki: Duration to display win/loss dialogue, in seconds.

playerDeadTextId.Wiki: Text to display on player destruction.

playerDeadTextWaitTime.Wiki: Duration to display text after player destruction, in seconds.

enemyDeadTextId.Wiki: Text to display on enemy destruction.

enemyDeadTextWaitTime.Wiki: Duration to display text after enemy destruction, in seconds.

Self.Wiki: Defines NPC arena in-match UI and display parameters.
